name: Ahrefs
highlight_text: Best For: Backlink Analysis and Keyword Research
description:
How does Ahrefs help agencies?

Ahrefs provides agencies with a powerful set of tools to boost their SEO efforts. With Site Explorer, agencies can analyze backlinks, traffic, and keywords. Keywords Explorer helps find valuable keywords, while Site Audit identifies and fixes technical SEO issues. Rank Tracker monitors keyword performance, and Content Explorer finds top-performing content and content gaps. Alerts keep agencies updated on backlinks, mentions, and rankings. Overall, Ahrefs helps agencies improve website performance, increase traffic, and achieve higher search engine rankings.

Source: G2

Features

  • Provides in-depth analysis of a website's backlink profile, organic traffic, and ranking keywords.
  • Helps agencies find relevant keywords with data on search volume, keyword difficulty, and click metrics.
  • Identifies technical SEO issues on websites, offering insights to improve site health and performance.
  • Tracks keyword rankings over time and provides detailed reports on position changes.
  • Allows agencies to discover top-performing content in their niche and identify content gaps.
  • Keeps agencies updated with notifications about new backlinks, lost backlinks, web mentions, and keyword rankings.
  • Enables agencies to analyze competitors' strategies, backlinks, and keyword rankings for better strategic planning.

Pros 

  • Gives a detailed outlook of your backlink analysis, competitor analysis and rank tracker 
  • Users say its great for competitor research and analysis 
  • Webmaster tool is free to use and is very helpful as per a lot of users and customers
  • UI is clean and easy to use

Cons

  • Pricing is a little too over the top 
  • They also dont offer a free trial which makes it difficult for the users to try their hands on the product 
  • Content Explorer is irrelevant and mostly shows random things that are not very helpful 

Pricing 

Priced at $129 Per Month
